parameters.name: text

parameters.subject: =🔍 Inspección En Revisión - {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.inspection.address }} - {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.agent.name }}

parameters.content:
## Notificación Inspección En Revisión

**Webhook:** POST /webhook/inspection-review-submitted

**Flujo:**
1. Webhook recibe evento del frontend
2. Respond inmediato (200)
3. WA al grupo comercial con detalles
4. Email a marinela + josemiguel con link directo

**Payload esperado:**
```json
{
  "event": "inspection_review_submitted",
  "agent": { "id", "name", "email", "phone" },
  "inspection": { "id", "property_id", "address", "inspection_date", "owner_name", "tenant_name", "url" },
  "submitted_at": "ISO date"
}
```
